home_demo_subtitle: Watch CultureCall analyze real-time conversations and surface cultural insights that prevent misunderstandings.
home_realtime_insights: AI-powered insights for cross-cultural conversations in real time
home_chat_or_demo: Chat with a partner or watch a simulated demo
home_sales_description: US sales rep closing with a Tokyo enterprise. Watch for soft rejections and consensus-building patterns.
home_interview_description: American PM interviewing a Brazilian candidate. Navigate high-context storytelling and warmth authenticity.
home_meeting_description: US product team in a meeting with German engineers. Balance German directness with US communication norms.
home_create_room_desc: Pick a scenario and your role. Get a 6-character room code.
home_share_code_desc: Send the code to your partner. They join in a second tab or device.
home_chat_insights_desc: Type naturally. CultureCall analyzes every message in real time.
home_join_existing_room: Have a room code? Join here
home_test_scripts_desc: Inside each chat room, click the 📋 button to see realistic conversation lines you can click to send instantly. Perfect for demos — no need to think up dialogue!
home_demo_description: Watch a simulated call while CultureCall generates real-time cultural insights. Great for presentations.
call_waiting_for_insights: Waiting for insights... Monitor the call.
report_formal_address_desc: Your use of respectful titles and formal tone built credibility with the prospect.
report_potential_friction: This communication pattern indicates potential friction.
report_coaching_suggestion_rejection: Prospect said 'that's interesting' - in Japanese business, this often signals polite disengagement rather than interest.
report_coaching_suggestion_silence: After your proposal, 5 seconds of silence occurred. This is normal - allow thinking space before following up.
report_soft_rejection_context: In Japanese business culture, this signals polite disengagement.
report_soft_rejection_recommendation: Send written summary. Avoid deadline pressure.
report_silence_processing_title: 5 seconds of silence after you spoke
report_silence_processing_context: In Japan, silence = valuable processing time, not rejection.
report_coaching_silence_desc: Wait 3-4 seconds of silence after presenting information. This is not rejection-they're thinking.
report_coaching_decision_circle_desc: Ask 'Who else needs to be involved?' Focus on getting buy-in from the full team, not just your primary contact.
report_coaching_followup_desc: Send detailed written proposals. Written documentation is the formal commitment in this culture.
